## Project Structure

project-folder/
├── src/

## Installation & Setup

### Prerequisites
<!-- List what needs to be installed before running your project -->
- Python 3.8+
- pip
- virtualenv (optional)

### Steps to Run
<!-- Provide clear steps to set up and run your project -->

1. Clone the repository
2. Navigate to project folder
3. Install dependencies: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
4. Configure environment variables (if applicable)
5. Run the application: `python src/main.py`

---

## Submission Checklist

- [ ] My project builds and runs successfully without errors
- [ ] README.md is included and complete with setup instructions
- [ ] Documentation is clear and comprehensive
- [ ] Screenshots or demo results are included (if applicable)
- [ ] All source code is included
- [ ] No secrets (passwords, API keys, .env files) are committed
- [ ] No plagiarism - all code is my own original work or properly attributed
- [ ] Project folder is placed in the correct course directory (SDC-I/RTRP/SDC-II)
- [ ] Project has been tested and is working as expected
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] Project follows the naming convention guidelines
